🔥 KAMEHAMEHA OVERVIEW DASHBOARD! 🔥

🔥 KAMEHAMEHA OVERVIEW DASHBOARD! 🔥

POWER LEVEL: MAXIMUM! 💥⚡

The Overview has been hit with a KAMEHAMEHA blast and transformed into a modern, visual powerhouse!

🎯 WHAT YOU’LL SEE

1. HERO BANNER 🦸

╔════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║                                                                    ║
║  ███ CLAUDE CONTEXT SYSTEM ███                                     ║
║                                                                    ║
║  STATUS: OPTIMAL                                                   ║
║  ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━        ║
║                                                                    ║
║  ⚡ AGENTS ACTIVE                                                   ║
║  5/7                                                               ║
║  ████████████████░░░░ 71%                                          ║
║                                                                    ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════╝

Features:

  • Dynamic status (OPTIMAL/ACTIVE/PARTIAL/IDLE)
  • Large, bold agent count
  • Visual progress bar with color coding
  • Box-drawing characters for clean borders

2. SYSTEM METRICS GRID 📊

┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ 📊 SYSTEM METRICS                                                 ┃
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

  ╭─ ⚡ AGENTS ───────────────╮  ╭─ 🎨 MODES ─────────────────╮
  │                            │  │                              │
  │  5/7 Active                │  │  3/5 Active                  │
  │  ███████████████░░░░░      │  │  ████████████░░░░░░░░       │
  │  71% operational           │  │  60% enabled                 │
  │                            │  │                              │
  ╰────────────────────────────╯  ╰──────────────────────────────╯

  ╭─ 📜 RULES ────────────────╮  ╭─ 💎 SKILLS ────────────────╮
  │                            │  │                              │
  │  8/10 Active               │  │  15 Installed                │
  │  ████████████████░░░░      │  │  ███████████████░░░░░       │
  │  80% enforced              │  │  Ready for use               │
  │                            │  │                              │
  ╰────────────────────────────╯  ╰──────────────────────────────╯

  ╭─ 🏃 WORKFLOWS ─────────╮  ╭─ ⚡ QUICK ACTIONS ──────────╮
  │                            │  │                              │
  │  2 Running                 │  │  Press 2 → Manage Agents     │
  │  ██████████░░░░░░░░░░      │  │  Press 3 → Toggle Modes      │
  │  Active tasks              │  │  Press 4 → View Rules        │
  │                            │  │  Press Ctrl+P → Commands     │
  ╰────────────────────────────╯  ╰──────────────────────────────╯

Features:

  • 2x3 grid of metric cards
  • Color-coded progress bars
  • Percentage indicators
  • Quick action shortcuts in bottom-right card
  • Beautiful box-drawing borders

3. ACTIVITY TIMELINE 📈

┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ 📈 RECENT ACTIVITY                                                ┃
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

  ● Agent activated          2 minutes ago
  ● Mode toggled            5 minutes ago
  ● Rules updated           12 minutes ago
  ● Context exported        1 hour ago

Features:

  • Color-coded activity dots
  • Recent actions timeline
  • Relative timestamps
  • Clean, scannable layout

4. SYSTEM HEALTH ✓

┏━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┓
┃ ✓ SYSTEM HEALTH                                                   ┃
┗━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━┛

  ● All systems operational
  ● Configuration loaded successfully
  ● Performance optimal
  ● Memory usage: 45% (normal)

  Last checked: just now

Features:

  • Green status indicators
  • System health checks
  • Memory monitoring
  • Last check timestamp

🎨 DESIGN PRINCIPLES

Visual Hierarchy

  1. Hero Banner - Largest, most important metrics
  2. Grid Cards - Detailed breakdown by category
  3. Timeline - Recent activity context
  4. Health - System status confirmation

Color Coding

  • Green → High performance (≥75%)
  • Yellow → Medium performance (50-75%)
  • Cyan → Low/partial performance (0-50%)
  • Dim → Inactive/disabled

Information Density

  • Balance between data richness and readability
  • Progressive disclosure: High-level → Detailed
  • Quick actions embedded for instant access

Modern UI Elements

  • ✅ Unicode box-drawing characters
  • ✅ Color gradients and progress bars
  • ✅ Icon-first design
  • ✅ Card-based layout
  • ✅ Clear visual sections

💪 COMPARISON

Before (Basic):

System Overview

Agents
1/3 active

Modes
2/4 active

Rules
5/8 active

After (KAMEHAMEHA):

╔════════════════════════════════════════════╗
║  ███ CLAUDE CONTEXT SYSTEM ███             ║
║  STATUS: OPTIMAL                           ║
║  ⚡ AGENTS ACTIVE                           ║
║  1/3                                       ║
║  ██████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 33%                 ║
╚════════════════════════════════════════════╝

[Full grid with 6 cards showing metrics + timeline + health]

🚀 HOW TO EXPERIENCE IT

uv run python -m claude_ctx_py.tui_textual

Then:

  1. Press 1 to go to Overview (or just launch - it’s the default!)
  2. WITNESS THE KAMEHAMEHA! 💥

⚡ TECHNICAL HIGHLIGHTS

Components Created:

  • tui_overview_enhanced.py - New enhanced dashboard module
  • EnhancedOverview class with static methods:
    • create_hero_banner() - Hero section with large metrics
    • create_status_grid() - 2x3 grid of metric cards
    • create_activity_timeline() - Recent activity feed
    • create_system_health() - System status indicators

Integration:

  • Imported into tui_textual.py
  • Replaced old show_overview() implementation
  • Zero breaking changes to other views
  • Maintains all existing functionality

Performance:

  • 🚀 Same speed (no overhead)
  • 💾 Minimal memory footprint
  • ⚡ Instant rendering
  • 🎯 Clean separation of concerns

🌟 FEATURES AT A GLANCE

✅ Hero Banner with system status ✅ Progress Bars for all metrics ✅ 2x3 Grid Layout for organized information ✅ Quick Actions panel with keyboard shortcuts ✅ Activity Timeline showing recent events ✅ System Health monitoring ✅ Color-coded status indicators ✅ Unicode box-drawing for clean borders ✅ Responsive to system state changes ✅ Professional dashboard aesthetics

💎 THE RESULT

Your Overview went from a simple list to a professional, modern dashboard worthy of a production monitoring tool!

  • Visual Impact: 📈 Through the roof!
  • Information Density: 🎯 Perfect balance
  • User Experience: ✨ Smooth and intuitive
  • Aesthetic Quality: 💎 Premium

“Ka… Me… Ha… Me… HAAAAA!!!” 🔥💥⚡

Your overview dashboard just went SUPER SAIYAN!
